productDisplayName: Lee Women Mid Stone Blue Maxi Fit Jeans
description: Composition Blue super skinny jeans made of cotton blend fabric with Lycra, has two insert pockets on the front side, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure Fit Extra low-rise, super skinny fit Wash care Colour will bleed Machine wash separately in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Turn garment inside out for washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron If you're a denim person, these blue super skinny jeans from lee will delight you. Exta low-rise, with a super skinny fit, you might not want to take them off once you pull them on! Plus, these jeans come with Lycra, giving them a fit to die for. Perfect companion for your t-shirts and sexy tops. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 38.5" Height: 5.9' Waist: 26.5"
